jobs.name: Daily Memory Review
jobs.task: Review today's memory files in memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Extract key decisions, lessons learned, and important context. Update MEMORY.md with anything worth keeping long-term. Remove stale or outdated entries from MEMORY.md.

jobs.name: System Health Check
jobs.task: Run a health check: verify all agent configs are valid JSON, check disk space, verify services are responsive, check for any error logs. Report issues to the orchestrator.

jobs.name: Weekly Expense Summary
jobs.task: Generate a weekly expense summary from the invoice-manager service. Include: total spent, by category, overdue invoices, and any anomalies. Report to the orchestrator for Yair.
